description: Use this API to assign one of the main simulation output channels to a designated CRT plot channel. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = crt_plot_channel(crtchan, channel, cmin, cmax)

parameters.name: crtchan
parameters.description: Crt plot channel number (1 through 6). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Number of the main simulation channel to be assigned to crt channel number crtchan (must be between 1 and the number of output channels allowed at the present size level of psse), or 0 to disable crt plot channel crtchan. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: cmin
parameters.description: Minimum plotting scale value for this crt plot channel. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: cmax
parameters.description: Maximum plotting scale value for this crt plot channel. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: CMIN is not less than CMAX.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
warnings - one or more of: - CHANNEL is larger than NCHAN.
